Welcome home to 4689 Crystal Lake Ave NW, Canal Fulton, Ohio. Home shoppers, stop your search because this home just might have everything youâ€™ve been dreaming of and more! Situated within Jackson Township, on the boarder of Canal Fulton and Massillon, sits this newly restored home. This property, built in 1888, is rich in history and charm as it was originally a School House which then was later converted into a home. It now has 5 bedrooms and 3 full bathrooms with an open concept living and entertaining area, as well as a large bonus living area on the second floor. Vaulted ceilings, an abundance of natural light, luxury finishes, charm, and plenty of space for the whole family make up just some of the many special features this home has to offer. Live and host in both comfort and style with the fully updated kitchen complete with luxury quartz counter tops, new cabinetry, new appliances, and ability to entertain both inside and outside. This home offers main floor living as well! Down the hall from the main living area is the master suite featuring a luxurious ensuite bathroom with soaking tub and standing shower and a large walk-in closet. One additional bedroom, full bathroom, and the laundry room finish off the main level. Continue your living and entertaining on the second level where you will find a bonus living area at the top of the landing, 3 more bedrooms, and a full bathroom. Heading to the backyard, make your way through the mudroom and finished breezeway area featuring an indoor grilling station! Additional updates: new well pump, and water treatment system, new windows, hot water tank, garage door/exterior doors. Close to Jackson schools, Towpath trails, lakes, highway access, downtown Canal Fulton, event centers, coffee shops, restaurants, shopping, entertaining, and more! Come take the tour in person today and make the original school house at 4689 Crystal Lake Ave your next home!

mismatches.Public_Remarks: This custom-built home by Yoder Homes from Hartville is ready for new owners. Walk up and enter through the front door into an inviting foyer with wood floors and a coat closet.  In the living room you can find a gas fireplace and plenty of room for whatever size furniture you wish.  The kitchen offers plenty of cupboard and counter space, appliances and a pantry.
